title: Guttaco Rice!
description: A mod that adds rice as a new food option
body:
Guttaco Rice! introduces a new plant to the game called Wild Rice, which can be found in the swamp biome.
Players can obtain rice seeds by harvesting this plant.
Once obtained, rice seeds can be planted and grown just like other crops in the game.

Once the rice is fully grown, players can harvest it and cook it in a furnace/smoker.
Cooked rice can then be crafted into a bowl of rice, which can be eaten by the player.
The bowl of rice restores more hunger points than raw rice, making it a valuable food source for survival in Minecraft.

To comabt the usage of non edible wooden bowls we added the kelp bowl, to utilize the kelp bowl with rice you first need to cook it in a furnace/smoker to create the Dried Kelp Bowl, Since the kelp bowl itself is edible the kelp bowl with rice is a better food source

We also have a Shulker Bento Box, which can store a certain amount of rice and will always fill your hunger, if there is enough rice in it
